description: You are a motion graphics designer. Create a Picture-in-Picture (PiP) composition using the scene '/home/ga/OpenToonz/samples/dwanko_run.tnz' by scaling the animation to approximately 50% size and positioning it in the bottom-right corner of the frame. The rest of the frame should remain empty. Render the result as a PNG sequence of at least 24 frames to '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/pip_corner/'.
